caption: The neon lights of Neo-Tokyo reflect off my skin, but it's the spring breeze that sets the mood today. I adjusted my sleek coat, feeling the weight of confidence in every step. The air smells of ozone and blooming jasmine. They call this place cold, but I bring my own warmth. Ready to explore, ready to captivate. 🌸🔮 #CyberpunkQueen #NeonSpring
